name: MarketplaceTranslationCacheJob

neutralConcepts: async queue consumer — runs under MASTER_TENANT_ID CLS context
SETNX at ORDER 1 with key idem:translate:master:${moduleId}:${locale} (DNA-7 + CF-816)
uses master-tenant AI keys (tenant cost attribution preserved)
writes CAS blob + F1523.storeRef with tenantId=MASTER_TENANT_ID + connectionType=FLOW_SCOPED
ONLY service permitted to switch CLS to master for translation (CF-811)
duplicate invocation returns { skipped: true } — no second AI call

ironRules.rule: ONLY MarketplaceTranslationCacheJob may switch CLS context to MASTER_TENANT_ID for translation. All other translation calls use current ALS context unchanged.
SETNX idempotency at ORDER 1 with key idem:translate:master:${moduleId}:${locale}. Concurrent jobs for same moduleId/locale produce exactly one master CAS blob.

keywords: marketplace translation cache job async master tenant CLS context setnx idempotency ORDER 1 FLOW-48
